evidence.comment: distinct queries against this table inside the lookback window
average physical_input_bytes per query — drives saving_per_query
average wall-clock per query, observational only
NDV unavailable — falling back to BloomWriteConfig::default_selectivity (see design note)
2 * table_total_bytes (read + write for a full OPTIMIZE)
placeholder tariff (see SHELF-52 design note); replaced by shelf_cost::Cents once PR #68 lands

rationale.regex_caveat: Predicate columns are extracted via a configurable regex over raw SQL text (BloomWriteConfig::predicate_column_regex). CTE inlining, function-wrapped predicates, and subqueries are silently missed; review the column list before applying.
rationale.tier4_link: If >30% of advisor cost concentrates in tables with no writer-side blooms, this recommender's output gates Tier-4 SHELF-G2 (`shelfd::side_bloom`) — see plan §Tier-4.
